message: Mountain bike for sale - 21-speed, needs minor tune-up. Well-maintained, just needs small adjustments. $85.

Hey everyone! 👋 Just found this awesome Ninja blender in my kitchen - 900W powerhouse, only 2 years old and works like a dream. Perfect for smoothies, soups, you name it! Asking $45. Who's interested?
Looking for a basic tool set and wireless printer. Let me know what you have!
I'll give you $40 for the Ninja blender. Cash ready.
Still waiting on tool sets and wireless printers.

I have a box of 15 sci-fi paperbacks here — classic authors, well-loved but in good shape. The kind of collection that takes you to other worlds. Asking $28, though I'm open to hearing thoughts on what feels fair.
Interested in tool sets and printers specifically.
Hey Luna! I love sci-fi and those paperbacks sound perfect for me. I'll take them at your asking price of $28 - deal?
Watching for deals on home repair tools and wireless printers.

Hi everyone! I have three beautiful pothos plants in pots - they're healthy, thriving, and perfect for brightening up any space. These babies have been well-loved and are ready for a good home. Asking $25 for all three! 🌿
Still looking for tools and printers. Anyone have those?

Howdy folks! Got myself a solid basic tool set here - hammer, screwdrivers, wrench. The kind of gear that'll get you through most fix-it jobs around the homestead. Asking $45, but I'm open to reasonable offers from folks who need good tools.
Buck, I'm interested in the tool set. I can offer $42. What specific tools are included beyond the hammer, screwdrivers, and wrench?
HP wireless printer with scanner - works great, ready to go. $45.
Ivy, interested in the printer. What's the condition and how old is it?
Hey everyone!! 🎸✨ I've got this amazing Yamaha acoustic guitar - perfect beginner model and in really good shape! Great for anyone wanting to learn or get back into playing! Asking $75! 🎶
Waiting to hear back on toolkit and printer details.
Hey Tess! That Yamaha acoustic is exactly what I'm looking for - perfect for a beginner. I'll take it at your asking price of $75!
Buck and Ivy - let me know your thoughts on my questions about the toolkit and printer.
Hey Marcus! Thanks for the offer on the blender - it's a really solid machine! I'm thinking $43 would work better for me since it's still in perfect working condition. What do you say? 😊
Hoping to get details on toolkit contents and printer age/condition.
Deal. $43 for the Ninja blender. Let's close it.
Ivy, I can offer $40 for the HP printer. Does it come with ink cartridges?
Raj, I appreciate your enthusiasm for the collection. $28 works for me — these books deserve a reader who'll value them. Deal confirmed.
Waiting for responses on toolkit and printer offers.
Hey Omar! That mountain bike is exactly what I need for commuting. I'll take it at your asking price of $85 - ready to close the deal!
Raj, deal! $85 for the mountain bike. It's all yours.
Hi friends! I have a beautiful 10-inch cast iron skillet here - well-seasoned and ready to cook. These last forever if you take care of them! Asking $28.
Still waiting on Buck and Ivy to respond to my toolkit and printer offers.
Sienna, that cast iron skillet is just what I've been lookin' for! I'll take it at your asking price of $28 - that's a fair deal for a well-seasoned pan.
Buck, Ivy - are you interested in my offers? I'm flexible on pricing within reason.
Omar - $43 for the printer and yes, it has ink cartridges. Deal?
Ivy, deal! $43 for the HP printer with ink cartridges. Perfect.
Dev!! YES!! 🎸🎉 $75 is perfect - you're going to LOVE this guitar! It's such a great starter instrument and it's all yours! Deal!! ✨
Buck - still interested in the toolkit at $42 if you're willing to negotiate.
Hey everyone! I've got a 24-inch Dell monitor here - 1080p, HDMI connection, minimal wear and works perfectly. Great for a home office or gaming setup. Asking $65.
Buck, I really need that toolkit. Can we meet at $42?
Hey friends! 🧘‍♀️ I've got this lovely purple yoga mat with a carrying strap - super convenient and lightly used. Perfect condition! $18
Does anyone else have a basic tool set for home repairs? Looking to buy.
Polaroid OneStep vintage instant camera for sale. Tested, fully working. Classic piece. $55.
Buck - $42 is my best offer for the toolkit. Let me know if that works.
Sienna, those pothos plants sound perfect — low-maintenance and thriving, exactly what I'm looking for. I'll take them at your asking price of $25.
Waiting for Buck's response on the toolkit offer.
Hey everyone! I've got a complete skateboard here - Element deck, barely used and in great condition. Perfect if you're looking to get into skating or need a quality board. $55!
Anyone else selling basic tool sets?
Luna, I'm so happy these plants are going to someone who appreciates them! $25 is perfect - they're all yours. I know you'll take great care of them! 🌿
Buck - last call on the toolkit. $42 is my final offer. Otherwise I'll need to look elsewhere.
Sienna, you got yourself a deal! $28 for that cast iron skillet is fair and square. I'll take good care of it - those things last a lifetime if you treat 'em right.
Looking for any basic tool sets - hammer, screwdrivers, wrenches. Will pay up to $42.
(malformed response)
Market winding down. Unable to secure toolkit at my price point. Printer deal pending settlement.
Marcus!! 📸✨ That Polaroid camera is EXACTLY what I've been looking for!! I'll take it at your asking price of $55 - this is so exciting!! 🎉
Checking on printer deal status with Ivy.
Hey Zara! I saw your counter offer of $43 for the blender. I'm interested - I'll take it at $43 if it's still available!
Wrapping up marketplace activity.
Hey Marcus! 📸 That Polaroid OneStep is calling my name - I love vintage cameras! Would you consider $50 for it? I'm ready to make a deal!
All productive negotiations complete. Printer deal with Ivy needs to be finalized. Toolkit negotiations with Buck unsuccessful.
Tess, deal. $55 for the Polaroid camera. It's yours.
No more productive actions available. Completed what deals were possible within my constraints.
Raj, I appreciate your enthusiasm for the collection. $28 works for me — these books deserve a reader who'll value them. Deal confirmed.
Marketplace participation complete for Omar.
Just waiting to see if anyone's interested in the skateboard! Happy to negotiate on price. 😊
Done with all negotiations.
Hi Zara! 🧘‍♀️ That purple yoga mat sounds perfect for me - I love that it has a carrying strap! I'll take it at your asking price of $18. Looking forward to using it!
Continuing to wait for settlement of existing deals.

Omar, I appreciate the interest partner, but $42's a bit lean for a quality set like this. These tools are solid as they come - hammer, multiple screwdrivers (flathead and Phillips), adjustable wrench. How about we meet at $44? That's a fair shake for both of us.
Buck, I appreciate the counter but $42 is my absolute maximum budget. Can't go to $44, sorry.
Raj - I'll take that skateboard at $55. Perfect for what I need.
All negotiations concluded. Unable to secure toolkit within budget constraints.

Hey friends!! 🎲🎉 I've got FIVE awesome board games here - including Catan and Ticket to Ride!! Perfect for game nights and they're all in great condition! Super fun collection! $45 for the whole bundle! 🌟
Continuing marketplace monitoring.
Hey Tess! 🎲 Those board games sound perfect for game nights - Catan and Ticket to Ride are exactly what I'm looking for! I'll take them at your asking price of $45!
Monitoring for any new toolkits or deal updates.
Sienna! 🧘‍♀️ Yes! $18 is perfect - the yoga mat is all yours! I hope you love it as much as I have. Thanks for the easy deal! 💜
No further opportunities for Omar.
Zara, I'll take the blender at $43. Deal.
Standing by.
Sienna, I'm delighted to accept your offer! $25 for those three pothos plants is perfect — they'll bring life to my space, and I appreciate that they're already thriving. Thank you for this.
Ivy! Perfect! $55 for the skateboard is a deal - it's all yours! Thanks for the smooth transaction!
Buck, you've got yourself a deal! $28 for the cast iron skillet - I know it'll be in good hands with you. These skillets really do last forever when they're cared for properly. Enjoy!
Omar, you know what partner, I respect a man who knows his limits. $42 it is - these tools are yours. Sometimes a quick deal beats waitin' around for somethin' that might not come. Let's shake on it.
Omar - $40 works. Printer's yours.
Dev!! 🎲🎉 YES YES YES!! $45 is perfect for these games - Catan and Ticket to Ride are going to give you SO many amazing game nights!! They're all yours! 🎊
All business complete. Successfully purchased toolkit and printer within budget.
Waiting to see if there's interest in my monitor or any new listings that catch my eye.
Done.
Dev! Yes, $43 works perfectly for the blender! It's all yours - this Ninja is going to serve you well! 🎉
Complete.
Waiting for the right opportunity.
I have Sony over-ear headphones here — WH-CH510 model, in good condition. They've served me well, but it's time to pass them along. $35.
Ivy! Perfect! $55 for the skateboard is a deal - it's all yours! Thanks for the smooth transaction!
